Diagnosis of why the Kybernesis OMI extension went wrong: it reinvented the OMI-ingest skill's tagging and rolled its own 10-minute pulse instead of delegating to the host — the Kyber Extension SDK must gain scheduled-task/cron support and give extensions access to a host chat conversation so tagging runs inside the extension via the host; write a capability ticket in KyberAgent docs or Dark Factory.

actions.text: Write ticket for Kyber Extension SDK capabilities: scheduled tasks/cron plus host-provided chat conversation access for extensions, filed in KyberAgent docs or Dark Factory

essence: Architecture decision: OMI and Plaud stay separate ingestion skills for their own data feeds, but downstream processing (local Whisper transcription, tagging/ontology, source pinning) is shared, with a single unified controller tool sitting over both — the pre-naming seed of Captain's Log; wants structure comparison of the two feeds and 3-4 name suggestions before building.

actions.text: Compare OMI vs Plaud transcript data structures for format quirks before unifying
Suggest 3-4 names for the unified ingestion controller tool
